message:
refactor: remove duplicate flywheel visualization files; differentiate tool colors

- Delete components/flywheel-visualization.tsx and root-level
  flywheel-visualization.tsx (1140 lines each) — these were duplicates
  superseded by the franken-flywheel component
- Update tool color assignments in lib/content.ts to improve visual
  differentiation: NTM (sky/blue), SLB (red/rose), Mail (amber/yellow)
  — previously several tools shared near-identical green gradients

Also syncs .beads/issues.jsonl.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
